reviews.review_description: I love the immersive experience. However, absent, any hardcopy or even virtual guidance it’s like clamping around in the dark, ￼more often than that I have difficulty playing the actual travel episode. My controllers for some reason cannot make it play. I go to media and see what’s wrong there. I can confirm the app was downloaded. I go back to the app. I can get into the introduction go so far it’s a select something then it won’t even engage the video when I try to leave or download the video when I try to leave it won’t go. I put it on Home it won’t take me back so I have to reset it. It’s very aggravating.
superbe experience summersive. J'ai adoré!
Although interesting. When a person appears in front of you. Do they have to be just inches from your face. I’m sure that if they were a few feet away, we would still be able to hear and see them ￼.
I need more of this. Need to improve quality and 360º but it is insane i was in shock i felt i traveled

The best videos from Meta Quest 
🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻Ecosphere🙏🏻🙏🏻🙏🏻

Love learning about other cultures and the impact of climate change to their lives.  Let's all be aware and do our part to lessen our footprint in whatever ways we can.  Peoples lives and livelihoods depend on it.

Really sad because i love the content and concept of this app but the graphics are just so bad in the quest 3 that it causes my eyes to hurt. Its a pixelated mess and was clearly designed for lower resolution. Please update! Willing to even pay for the app

I recommend this for all United Nations staff and for civilians who are curious about global matters. This is a heart touching series and fills one with the sense of empathy and compassion. 

*The app begins with a sphere of the planet floating above an electromagnetic platform. One almost feels like an Olympian, an observer from digital space, as options for immersive exploration guides players to spin the globe.

*For the initial series, people are able to select videos and 3D documentaries for a variety of areas around the world. With a few clicks, one can dive deep into the oceans, fly high above jungles and explore towns while learning. 

*For the beginning of each country area, there is an initial download wait time. If you keep your headset stationary, you can walk away to go make popcorn, grab a snack and then come back to it. 

*Each area has additional videos which are smaller, but download quickly. An added bonus.

reviews.review_title: Not what I had in mind!
reviews.review_description:
I was looking for Google Earth!
Not this Video Player!🤦

I couldn't even start to watch it, as soon as l got in, it was awash with new age , woke propaganda.
Climate change dogma and poverty porn for champagne socialists.

Truly love this! If I didn’t have responsibilities in life I might just live in the ocean or Africa 24/7! Haha.  Can’t get enough of this. FYI I’m a 55 yr old gma that likes to lose at beat saber against her gson lol. Love it on my own. Going back to the ocean now!
this is such a beautiful app - I want more and more cities and areas. Really breathtaking. You feel like you could literally reach out and touch it

I bought 2 sets of the Oculus 2 for both my husband and I for Valentine’s Day. We’ve traveled a lot but since Covid and getting older there are some places I know we’re just not going to go and the jungle of Borneo is one of them.  What a treat for us to do this together and it was a really cool experience. Great narration and graphics. Wonderful immersive video. And, It’s the first app that we’ve done together and we were stationary. What an incredible experience.  I   can’t wait to visit other destinations on this app!
When I choose an ecosystem to watch there’s no video to select or to start. I can only see the sphere and listen to the intro but nothing around to click on to… how can I see or download the content?
Not sure of the company is out of business? Their ToS link here leads straight to a 404. The app always starts in offline mode, making it unable to download any of the actual content.

developer_response.body: Hi zulyking. Rest assured, we're not out of business and we're sorry to hear about your experience with the app. We appreciate your feedback. Can you contact ecosphere@phoria.com.au so we can further troubleshoot this issue? All the best — Team ecosphere

reviews.review_description: Would love to experience the vids in 360 degree
It’s a free app and you get what you’d expect for it being free… I think brink should have been free. In my opinion this is better than that app.
I couldn't get past the rotating globe. It wasn't until the reviews that I realized there was more to it. I couldn't figure it out though so I Uninstaller and moved on.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, we're sorry to hear this and thank you for your feedback. We have recently released a new update which we believe will address this issue, please give it a try and let us know how it goes!
Please contact our support email ecosphere@phoria.com.au if you have any questions or concerns. It would be great to hear you were able to to experience our new Journeys content! 
Thanks again!

All the best,
Team ecosphere

reviews.review_description:
The videos are fantastic but maybe the compression could be improved for a really high definition experience?

But the experience is still amazing! Beautiful use of 3D video and really brings the subjects to life. It’s narrated well too so really feels like the next level for documentaries. 

I hope that this is only the start for Ecosphere and that more experiences will be added as time goes on!

It's a collection of 15-minute nature documentaries, presented in 180 degree 3D video, 3DOF and no interactivity.

The 3 videos included on launch are interesting. I wish Oculus would create a separate category in the store and library for this type of non-interactive content.
Best wildlife show ever! The only thing it missing is David Attenborough to narrate it. Can’t wait for more

I want more! 

Each story is compelling and inspiring. Beautiful cinematography. The images are pretty clear. It is powerful to have an animal looking at you 2 feet from your face !

This is my favorite app.

Very nicely done. I wish they were a dozen more videos like this. I would cheerfully  donate $0.50 each just to watch, with the option to donate up to $5 total if I liked what I saw about the mission.
Love the views, cant wait til the James webb goes up!

I have installed & uninstalled on Quest 2 multiple times. The app doesnt want to download. Even uninstalled & used phone to download via Meta app. doesnt work. Meta uses content from this app to advert the oculus product which is questionable.
I have the Oculus Quest 2 and the files downloaded quickly.
Unfortunately the content refuses to download for me (and judging by other comments, apparently many others). Is this perhaps regional blocking? Please fix!
Absolutely tremendous, leaves one with a feeling of hope for our magnificent planet. Thank you to the indigenous care takers.
Can’t get it to work, the update won’t download. It just says “Up next” when i coco the downloads. I’ve deleted it multiple times and reinstalled. Nothing works. Bummed out

developer_response.body: Hey monique418. We're sorry to hear about your experience with the app, thanks for letting us know. Can you contact ecosphere@phoria.com.au so we can further troubleshoot this issue? All the best — Team ecosphere

reviews.review_description: Very much enjoyed the coral reef experience as well as the African Elephants. I found the Borneo experience to be more environmentally focused than wildlife experience.
I love this  one

The films within this app are very beautiful, clear and educational. Unfortunately, there are only three, Kenya, Borneo and a reef area at the interface of the Indian and Pacific ocean. I would love to see additional films and would be happy to pay for them.

This game has some awesome experiences, but there is one downside. U can't look around 360 degrees. Also, there aren't that much experiences, but I enjoyed it 

PS: Please add more ( + 360° )

reviews.review_title: It's pretty but requires other downloads
reviews.review_description: The graphics are nice. All I see is a ball tho. Says I need more downloads to do anything with it, however it doesn't tell you where those are nor gives any option so besides being very pretty "snowglobes", that's really all I get. So 2 stars since it's just a snow globe but very pretty ones.

developer_response.body:
Hey Damian, thanks for your feedback. We've had some issues with the system that have required an update, which should now be resolved. Could you update and try again? You should see a menu to update and download 360 and 180 movies, and we've actually added two new locations! 

Would love for you to try it out, let us know if its been resolved and adjust your review if you're satisfied. You can reach us directly on ecosphere@phoria.com.au for any further feedback or assistance :)

reviews.review_description:
I too cannot find where to download content. Can only see sphere with intro. Watched demo on YouTube and it is supposed to have video clips behind sphere to download. Does not show that on my quest 2 headset. 
Help from anyone?

There’s only 3 locations, and a handful of videos for each one. I watched the 4 Kenya videos and was disappointed to see the same footage recycled in multiple videos. The experience is not 360 degrees so you’re looking into a black void if you turn your head to the side. There isn’t any interactivity so these are basically like watching YouTube videos on a really large screen.
Really great total immersion in the environment. You feel like you're about 3 feet away from the animals
It is just a big screen in front of you. Cant even call it a VR. At least have a 360 view but it doesn't.
Please add more these 3 videos are awesome but totally needs more!
Loved this app and experience. I am really hoping for more locations!!
